name: Claim of Right Tax Computation

eligibility.description: Applies when an item was included in gross income in a prior year under an apparent unrestricted right, but a deduction is allowed in the current year because that right was found to be restricted.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers who repay more than $3,000 previously included in income to either take a current deduction or a credit for the tax paid in the prior year.
